metadata.description: The display name of the workbook.
The unique ID for the workbook.
The name of the Log Analytics workspace.
The resource group of the Log Analytics workspace.
The subscription ID of the Log Analytics workspace.

properties.serializedData:
{"version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"# 🛡️ Unified Security Posture
---
Executive view across Microsoft Defender for Endpoint, Entra ID, and Defender for Cloud. All data is live — no refresh needed."},"name":"title"},{"type":9,"content":{"version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","parameters":[{"id":"timeRange","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"TimeRange","type":4,"isRequired":true,"value":{"durationMs":604800000},"typeSettings":{"selectableValues":[{"durationMs":86400000},{"durationMs":259200000},{"durationMs":604800000},{"durationMs":2592000000}],"allowCustom":true},"label":"Time Range"}],"style":"pills","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"},"name":"parameters"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 📊 Alert Overview"},"name":"alerts-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SecurityAlert
| summarize
    Total = count(),
    High = countif(AlertSeverity == 'High'),
    Medium = countif(AlertSeverity == 'Medium'),
    Low = countif(AlertSeverity == 'Low'),
    Informational = countif(AlertSeverity == 'Informational')
| project Total, High, Medium, Low, Informational","size":4,"title":"Alert counts by severity","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"tiles","tileSettings":{"showBorder":true,"titleContent":{"columnMatch":"","formatter":1},"leftContent":{"columnMatch":"Total","formatter":12,"formatOptions":{"palette":"blue"}}}},"customWidth":"100","name":"kpi-alerts"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SecurityAlert
| summarize AlertCount = count() by AlertSeverity
| sort by AlertCount desc","size":3,"title":"Alerts by severity","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"piechart","chartSettings":{"seriesLabelSettings":[{"seriesName":"High","color":"redBright"},{"seriesName":"Medium","color":"orange"},{"seriesName":"Low","color":"yellow"},{"seriesName":"Informational","color":"blue"}]}},"customWidth":"33","name":"chart-severity"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SecurityAlert
| summarize AlertCount = count() by ProductName
| sort by AlertCount desc
| take 10","size":3,"title":"Alerts by product","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"barchart"},"customWidth":"34","name":"chart-product"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SecurityAlert
| where AlertSeverity in ('High', 'Medium')
| summarize AlertCount = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| sort by TimeGenerated asc","size":3,"title":"High & medium alerts over time","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"linechart"},"customWidth":"33","name":"chart-trend"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 🖥️ Endpoint Coverage"},"name":"endpoint-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"DeviceInfo
| summarize LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated), OnboardingStatus = take_any(OnboardingStatus), OSPlatform = take_any(OSPlatform), DeviceType = take_any(DeviceType), MachineGroup = take_any(MachineGroup), ExposureLevel = take_any(ExposureLevel) by DeviceId
| summarize
    TotalDevices = count(),
    Onboarded = countif(OnboardingStatus == 'Onboarded'),
    NotOnboarded = countif(OnboardingStatus != 'Onboarded'),
    HighExposure = countif(ExposureLevel == 'High')
| project TotalDevices, Onboarded, NotOnboarded, HighExposure","size":4,"title":"Device coverage summary","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"tiles","tileSettings":{"showBorder":true,"titleContent":{"columnMatch":"","formatter":1},"leftContent":{"columnMatch":"TotalDevices","formatter":12,"formatOptions":{"palette":"blue"}}}},"customWidth":"100","name":"kpi-devices"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"DeviceInfo
| summarize LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated), OnboardingStatus = take_any(OnboardingStatus), OSPlatform = take_any(OSPlatform) by DeviceId
| summarize DeviceCount = count() by OSPlatform, OnboardingStatus
| sort by DeviceCount desc","size":3,"title":"Devices by OS & onboarding status","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"barchart","chartSettings":{"showLegend":true}},"customWidth":"50","name":"chart-devices-os"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"DeviceInfo
| summarize LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated), ExposureLevel = take_any(ExposureLevel), MachineGroup = take_any(MachineGroup), DeviceName = take_any(DeviceName) by DeviceId
| where ExposureLevel == 'High'
| project DeviceName, ExposureLevel, MachineGroup, LastSeen
| sort by LastSeen desc
| take 10","size":0,"title":"Top 10 high exposure devices","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"ExposureLevel","formatter":18,"formatOptions":{"thresholdsOptions":"icons","thresholdsGrid":[{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"High","representation":"critical","text":"{0}{1}"},{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"Medium","representation":"warning","text":"{0}{1}"},{"operator":"Default","thresholdValue":null,"representation":"success","text":"{0}{1}"}]}},{"columnMatch":"LastSeen","formatter":6}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"50","name":"table-high-exposure"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 🔐 Identity Risk"},"name":"identity-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SigninLogs
| summarize
    TotalSignins = count(),
    FailedSignins = countif(ResultType != '0'),
    RiskySignins = countif(RiskLevelDuringSignIn in ('high', 'medium')),
    LegacyAuth = countif(ClientAppUsed in ('Exchange ActiveSync', 'IMAP4', 'MAPI', 'POP3', 'SMTP', 'Other clients'))
| project TotalSignins, FailedSignins, RiskySignins, LegacyAuth","size":4,"title":"Sign-in summary","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"tiles","tileSettings":{"showBorder":true,"titleContent":{"columnMatch":"","formatter":1},"leftContent":{"columnMatch":"TotalSignins","formatter":12,"formatOptions":{"palette":"blue"}}}},"customWidth":"100","name":"kpi-identity"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SigninLogs
| where RiskLevelDuringSignIn in ('high', 'medium')
| summarize RiskySignins = count() by UserPrincipalName
| sort by RiskySignins desc
| take 10","size":0,"title":"Top 10 users with risky sign-ins","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"filter":true}},"customWidth":"50","name":"table-risky-users"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SigninLogs
| where ClientAppUsed in ('Exchange ActiveSync', 'IMAP4', 'MAPI', 'POP3', 'SMTP', 'Other clients')
| summarize LegacyAuthCount = count() by UserPrincipalName
| sort by LegacyAuthCount desc
| take 10","size":0,"title":"Top 10 users still using legacy authentication","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"filter":true}},"customWidth":"50","name":"table-legacy-auth"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## ☁️ Cloud Recommendations"},"name":"cloud-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SecurityRecommendation
| where RecommendationState == 'Active'
| summarize
    Total = count(),
    Critical = countif(RecommendationSeverity == 'High'),
    Medium = countif(RecommendationSeverity == 'Medium'),
    Low = countif(RecommendationSeverity == 'Low')
| project Total, Critical, Medium, Low","size":4,"title":"Active recommendations","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"tiles","tileSettings":{"showBorder":true,"titleContent":{"columnMatch":"","formatter":1},"leftContent":{"columnMatch":"Total","formatter":12,"formatOptions":{"palette":"orange"}}}},"customWidth":"100","name":"kpi-recommendations"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SecurityRecommendation
| where RecommendationState == 'Active'
| summarize DeviceCount = dcount(DeviceId) by RecommendationDisplayName, RecommendationSeverity
| sort by DeviceCount desc
| take 15","size":0,"title":"Top active recommendations by affected devices","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"RecommendationSeverity","formatter":18,"formatOptions":{"thresholdsOptions":"icons","thresholdsGrid":[{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"High","representation":"critical","text":"{0}{1}"},{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"Medium","representation":"warning","text":"{0}{1}"},{"operator":"Default","thresholdValue":null,"representation":"success","text":"{0}{1}"}]}},{"columnMatch":"DeviceCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen"}}],"filter":true,"sortBy":[{"itemKey":"DeviceCount","sortOrder":2}]}},"customWidth":"100","name":"table-recommendations"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 🚨 Recent High Severity Alerts"},"name":"recent-alerts-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SecurityAlert
| where AlertSeverity == 'High'
| project TimeGenerated, AlertName, ProductName, CompromisedEntity, Status, Tactics
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 20","size":0,"title":"Recent high severity alerts","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"TimeGenerated","formatter":6},{"columnMatch":"AlertSeverity","formatter":18,"formatOptions":{"thresholdsOptions":"icons","thresholdsGrid":[{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"High","representation":"critical","text":"{0}{1}"},{"operator":"Default","thresholdValue":null,"representation":"warning","text":"{0}{1}"}]}}],"filter":true,"sortBy":[{"itemKey":"TimeGenerated","sortOrder":2}]}},"name":"table-recent-alerts"}],"styleSettings":{},"fromTemplateId":"","$schema":"https://github.com/Microsoft/Application-Insights-Workbooks/blob/master/schema/workbook.json"}
